Video.summary: Watch as the formidable mother-daughter duo, Lee and Anna Leigh Waters, take on challengers from North Carolina in this Pro Women's Doubles match from the US National Pickleball Center. After an injury, it is great to see the champions partner up again, demonstrating the "fire and ice" style of play that has made them national champions. While the Waters team's game one was a quick 11-point victory, the challengers, Fuzesi and Maloof, handled themselves well on the championship court. The players at home can learn from Anna Leigh's "instigator" shots and two-handed backhand rolls, which she helped bring to the big stage.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Fuzesi/Maalouf

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 ñ Mixed Team Match ñ Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: Lily Kordic and Kara Williams take on Nathalie Bagby and Natalija Shaw in this Women's Senior Pro Gold Medal Match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdueís Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creightonís Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdueís Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creightonís Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Purdue vs. Creighton

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Filmed at the US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, this Pro Womenís Doubles matchup features the powerhouse mother-daughter team Leigh and Anna Leigh Waters, known for their aggressive tactics and flawless communication. They square off against promising challengers Alexa Schull and Ava Cavataio, who bring fearless shot-making and tight teamwork to the court. From baseline drives to net duels, this clash of generations delivers fast-paced action, strategic rallies, and plenty of highlight-worthy moments.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 ñ Pro Womenís Doubles ñ Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 ñ Pro Womenís Doubles ñ Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 ñ Pro Womenís Doubles ñ Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio
US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 ñ Pro Womenís Doubles ñ Waters & Waters vs Schull & Cavataio

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: Stefan Andren and Alix Truong take on Christine Karges and Eric Oncins in this Mixed Pro Split Age Backdraw Semifinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Backdraw Semifinal

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Texas

Video.summary: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.
Video.title: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Image.alt: Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech
Women's Doubles Final - Virginia vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: Meet Caden Nemoff and the Scottsdale Scorchers.
Video.title: S01E02 - Scottsdale Scorchers

Image.alt: S01E02 - Scottsdale Scorchers
S01E02 - Scottsdale Scorchers
S01E02 - Scottsdale Scorchers

Video.summary: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of menís and womenís doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a critical Day 4 clash between the Rajasthan Titans and the league-leading Chennai Super Champs. Entering the tie as heavy favorites, coach Johnny Goldbergís Chennai squad looks to solidify their top spot on the leaderboard. Meanwhile, the Rajasthan Titans, led by coach Leigh Whitwell, are desperate to find their rhythm and climb the points table after a challenging start to the season.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbaiís Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldbergís top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
